Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0011",
  "title": "2025年视频素材占比74.1%，比去年提升14.2%；图片素材中方形图片占比最高为67.2%",
  "page_index": 12,
  "page_range": "12-13"
}

Section text:
2025年视频素材占比 74.1% ，比去年提升 14.2% ；图片素材中方形图片占比最高为
67.2%
•视频类创意在今年猛增至 74.1%，对比 2024年提升 14.2%。其中 30s以下的短创意占比 58%，
超过60s的超长创意占比 6.9%；
•图片素材占比 24.7% ，比去年占比下降 11.6%，其中方形图片创意占比最高为 67.2% 。2025年 全球手游 素材类型观察
Source ：广大大，根据后台抓取后数据整理后展现

message.content:
**Topics:** Global mobile game advertising creative trends, video vs. image format distribution, video duration breakdown, image aspect ratio preferences, OS platform allocation by game weight and ad channel.
**Entities & Dates:** 2025 (coverage: Jan–Dec 2025), 2024, 2023; iOS, Android; Light/Mid/Heavy mobile games; FB channels, X (Twitter); Data provider: 广大大.
**Claims & Metrics:** 
- Video creatives reached 74.1% in 2025 (+14.2% YoY); image creatives fell to 24.7% (-11.6% YoY).
- Video duration: <30s accounts for 58% (≤15s: 12.8%, 16-30s: 45.2%); 31-59s: 35.1%; ≥60s: 6.9%.
- Image aspect ratio: Square dominates at 67.2%, followed by other (19.1%), vertical (11.5%), horizontal (2.2%).
- OS by game weight: Light games heavily favor Android (81.0%); mid and heavy games show ~35% iOS share (35.3% and 35.6%).
- OS by channel: X (Twitter) has the highest iOS advertiser share at 46.6%; FB channels average ~21% iOS.
**Evidence Types:** Quantitative industry statistics, year-over-year comparative data, categorical percentage breakdowns, chart-derived metrics.
**Target Retrieval Questions:** What is the 2025 distribution of video vs. image ad creatives for global mobile games? How have creative format shares changed YoY? What are the most common video durations and image aspect ratios? How does OS platform preference vary by game weight (light vs. mid/heavy)? Which ad channels have the highest iOS advertiser share? What is the data source and timeframe for these metrics?

     - Video creatives: 74.1% in 2025 (+14.2% YoY).

   - *Evidence Types:* Statistical data, charts/figures (implied by layout and percentages), industry report data from 广大大.

   - **Retrieval Questions Answered:** What is the 2025 distribution of video vs. image ad creatives for global mobile games? How has video creative usage changed YoY? - Video duration: <30s accounts for 58% (≤15s: 12.8%, 16-30s: 45.2%); 31-59s: 35.1%; ≥60s: 6.9%.
- Image aspect ratio: Square dominates at 67.2%, followed by other (19.1%), vertical (11.5%), horizontal (2.2%).
- OS by game weight: Light games heavily favor Android (81.0%); mid and heavy games show ~35% iOS share (35.3% and 35.6%).
- OS by channel: X (Twitter) has the highest iOS advertiser share at 46.6%; FB channels average ~21% iOS.
**Evidence Types:** Quantitative industry statistics, year-over-year comparative data, categorical percentage breakdowns, chart-derived metrics.
